content.text: @travisci hello! I had a project on your .com (https://travis-ci.com/filebrowser/filebrowser/builds) and everything was building well until today. This morning the PRs stopped building and now it just says ‘This project hasn’t been migrated’.
content.html: @travisci hello! I had a project on your .com (https://travis-ci.com/filebrowser/filebrowser/builds) and everything was building well until today. This morning the PRs stopped building and now it just says ‘This project hasn’t been migrated’.
